title: senecio leucophorbius
intro: Senecio leucophorbius, also known as the White Senecio or Groundsels, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion, constipation, and gas. The health benefits of Senecio leucophorbius include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce muscle spasms. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in teas to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
